mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_diagrams (user_id, title, description, tags, xml_data, thumbnail, file_size) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{tags}, #{xmlData}, #{thumbnail}, #{fileSize})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_diagrams WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, user_id, title, description, tags, thumbnail, file_size, created_at, updated_at FROM user_diagrams WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR tags LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY updated_at DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_diagrams WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR tags LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.update: UPDATE user_diagrams SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, tags = #{tags}, xml_data = #{xmlData}, thumbnail = #{thumbnail}, file_size = #{fileSize} WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE user_diagrams SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE user_diagrams SET deleted_at = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
